event: emergency craniotomy and decompression of right parieto-occipital glioma
weakness of left side of the body
Glasgow coma scale E2 V2 M3
intubated with 5.5 mm ID endotracheal tube
arterial line placed in left radial artery
venous access through two peripheral veins of legs
anesthesia maintained with oxygen, air, isoflurane, vecuronium
200 ml packed red blood cells transfused
central venous access attempted via right subclavian approach
ipsilateral internal jugular vein approach attempted
free flow of blood from two ports
next day central line inserted via left IJV
shifted to surgical ward on 14th day
